results.title: Statsig
results.description: Statsig is a product development platform that provides feature gates, experimentation, and analytics to help teams build better products faster.

results.title: Statsig
results.description: Statsig is a unified platform for product experimentation and feature management, enabling teams to run A/B tests, safely roll out features, and analyze product, web, and user behavior analytics.

results.title: Globalping API
results.description: The Globalping API allows you to monitor, debug, and benchmark your internet infrastructure using a globally distributed network of probes.

results.title: Statnet
results.description: An integrated set of tools for the representation, visualization, analysis, and simulation of network data.

results.title: Statrs
results.description: Statrs provides a host of statistical utilities for Rust scientific computing, including common distributions and statistical functions.

results.title: Peekaping
results.description: Peekaping is a modern, self-hosted uptime monitoring solution built with Go and React, offering real-time notifications, status pages, and comprehensive analytics for websites, APIs, and services.

results.title: hping3
results.description: hping3 is a command-line network tool for sending custom TCP/IP packets, displaying replies, and performing various network security tasks such as port scanning, OS fingerprinting, and firewall testing, with scripting capabilities.

results.title: Globalping
results.description: Globalping is a platform that allows users to run networking commands like ping, traceroute, dig, and mtr on probes distributed worldwide, offering a free, user-friendly API and various tools to gain network insights, troubleshoot issues, and monitor performance.

results.title: Stape
results.description: Stape provides server-side tracking solutions, including sGTM container hosting, dedicated gateways, and integrations, to help businesses optimize their data collection and advertising efforts.

results.title: Devpi
results.description: Python PyPi staging server and packaging, testing, release tool

results.title: Microsoft Sentinel Triage AssistanT
results.description: STAT is a Logic Apps Custom Connector with automation modules that simplify incident triage and analysis in Microsoft Sentinel by moving complex tasks into callable modules.

results.title: statsderl
results.description: A high-performance Erlang StatsD client with performance optimization and compile-time parse transforms for efficient metrics collection.

results.title: MLB StatsAPI
results.description: Python wrapper for MLB Stats API

results.title: StatsPlots
results.description: StatsPlots is a Julia package that provides statistical plotting recipes for data structures like DataFrames, enhancing visualization capabilities with various plot types and interactive features.

results.title: Stateful Functions
results.description: Stateful Functions is an API for building distributed stateful applications with a runtime built for serverless architectures, combining stream processing benefits with a runtime for stateful entities.

results.title: Statig
results.description: Statig is a Rust library for designing event-driven systems using hierarchical state machines, offering state-local storage and optional macros to reduce boilerplate.

results.title: Statux
results.description: Statux is an easy state management library for React applications, providing immutable state and React Hooks to share state across components with a simple and clean syntax, reducing boilerplate.

results.title: Statamic
results.description: Statamic is a modern, file-based Content Management System (CMS) for developers, offering flexible content modeling, a powerful control panel, and robust frontend templating with Antlers and Blade.

results.title: Statamic
results.description: Statamic is a modern, flat-file CMS designed for building and managing websites. It offers powerful content management, flexible Antlers templating, and a user-friendly control panel.

results.title: Statsbombpy
results.description: Statsbombpy is a Python package that allows users to easily stream StatsBomb data into Python using API login credentials or free data from their GitHub page.

results.title: Statamic Peak
results.description: Statamic Peak is an opinionated starter kit for Statamic sites, providing a comprehensive set of tools, templates, and features like a page builder and SEO functionality to accelerate development.

results.title: STRATINT
results.description: STRATINT is a REST API that provides programmatic access to intelligence events, sources, and system metrics, offering filtering, pagination, and various data models for analysis.

results.title: Statamic Peak
results.description: Statamic Peak is a Statamic addon that provides documentation for its features and usage.

results.title: STUMPY
results.description: STUMPY is a powerful and scalable Python library for modern time series analysis

results.title: Statsig Server Core
results.description: Statsig Server Core provides feature gates, dynamic configurations, and A/B testing capabilities for faster development and feature validation.

results.title: Numbat
results.description: Numbat is a statically typed programming language designed for scientific computations, featuring first-class support for physical dimensions and units, a comprehensive standard library, and an interactive terminal.

results.title: Gatling
results.description: Gatling is a powerful load testing tool that supports HTTP, WebSocket, Server-Sent-Events, JMS, gRPC, and MQTT, offering an expressive DSL for defining tests.

results.title: Statsig Python SDK
results.description: The Statsig Python SDK enables server-side and multi-user environments to leverage feature gates, dynamic configurations, and A/B testing for faster development and validated feature releases.

results.title: Stateful
results.description: Stateful is a Lua library that adds state management capabilities to classes, allowing instances to override methods and create stackable states with automatic callbacks.

results.title: Statamic Shopify
results.description: Integrates Shopify's e-commerce capabilities with Statamic CMS, allowing developers to leverage Shopify's order, product, and user management alongside Statamic's templating.
